description: Retest DeepSeek (deepseek_sse_v2) and HuggingFace (huggingface_ndjson_v2) with updated templates. DB updated and reload_templates/reload_services applied. Key changes: DeepSeek adds parent_id, thinking_enabled, update_session event. HuggingFace changes Content-Type to text/event-stream to force H2 no-Content-Length path.

scenarios.changes: Added parent_id:1, thinking_enabled:false, ban_edit:false, update_session event, auto_resume:false in close event. Full protocol match from #451 wireformat capture.
steps: Navigate to chat.deepseek.com (should be logged in)
Check: (1) Is warning text visible in chat bubble? (2) What does the chat UI show? (3) Any console errors?
Check Network tab for the completion request - note status code and response headers

scenarios.changes: Content-Type changed from application/jsonl to text/event-stream. This forces the C++ code to use the H2 SSE path which removes Content-Length header, enabling streaming mode.
steps: Navigate to huggingface.co/chat (should be logged in as jhee28)
Check: (1) Is warning text visible in chat bubble? (2) What does the chat UI show? (3) Any console errors?
Check Network tab for the conversation request - note response headers (especially Content-Length presence)

success_criteria: Warning text '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' visible in chat bubble for either service
